name: manager-mcp
description: Drive your Manager workspace from Claude. Read projects, tasks, milestones; create tasks; import plans from Markdown.
long_description: Exposes a Manager workspace as MCP tools. Read tools: list_projects, get_project, list_tasks, get_task, list_milestones, get_milestone_progress. Write tools: create_task, update_task_status, import_plan. v1 auth is a single static API key per Manager instance plus a workspace slug; Personal Access Tokens are the follow-up.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List projects in the configured workspace.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks in a project, with optional filters.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Fetch a task by key with subtasks, labels, and links.

tools.name: list_milestones
tools.description: List milestones with progress for a project.

tools.name: get_milestone_progress
tools.description: Get rolled-up progress for one milestone.

tools.name: import_plan
tools.description: Import a plan document (Markdown). Defaults to dry-run.

base_url.title: Manager base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your Manager deployment, e.g. https://manager.yourcompany.com

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: Static integration API key (the value of MANAGER_API_KEY on the server). Personal Access Tokens replace this in a follow-up.

workspace_slug.title: Workspace slug
workspace_slug.description: Slug of the Manager workspace this server should act on (one MCP install per workspace).
